final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing UI design system for web dashboards, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a classic minimalist tech aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include web dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls as core components
Subject: must include the full UI component library (dashboard layout, mobile screen, card components, button variants, control elements)
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a cool, futuristic atmosphere with visual depth — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a tech-forward direction with rich layering — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, polished surface treatment — exact sheen and weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the "classic minimalist tech" direction with strong visual hierarchy and tech-forward feel
Avoid:
